text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast says it's going to rain tonight, so I finish up my
work and try to get right home, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! Even from this terrestrial plane, I bring you into my majestic
light!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear a familiar voice coming from somewhere nearby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You think you're the only lightbringer? Then gaze upon my shining
glory! 'Tis the luminance of the one true Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O is at the riverside in her usual grandiosity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't you here, Trainer. I'm sure you're not surprised to see
that I'm having a battle of beauty with the evening star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Beauty, after all, is like racing against a fierce opponent; the struggle
for victory serves to make it stronger.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I take time every day to find a worthy foe to hone my skills against.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, back to our battle, evening star! Here I stand, so show me your
greatest brilliance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O faces the sky, striking a pose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Twinkle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...But the star seems to hide behind the coming rain clouds.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was a battle for the ages. Trainer, send the evening off
with a round of applause.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is, and with its end comes my victory. You saw it yourself. Before my
magnificent self, the star fled in shame!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This means my beauty now makes even the stars blush in
embarrassment. Who shall I challenge next? The moon... No, the sun
itself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it's going to rain soon, the moon is too shy tonight for a battle
unfortunately.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! Is there no one formidable enough to rival me? Trainer, do you
know anyone worthy?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, I understand it must be a most difficult question. Only one person could ever stand as my equal—me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So be it. I will have to bear my solitude and find comfort in the cool
night breeze as I search for my next rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hm... I wonder if she feels lonely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm her trainer—there must be something I can do for her. She says
only she can stand against herself, so...
choice_data_list: You could... battle yourself, for real.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What? You would have me fight me?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That might be the greatest thought in your life! I, the shining light,
did not know how truly bright I am!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What a fantastic idea! That's exactly what I'll do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I end up being called to the dance studio on my day off...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha! Watch carefully, Trainer. I shall defeat any
opponent with ease, even myself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You'll have a premium seat to witness my spectacular victory. Now let
the battle begin. First... a pose showdown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly starts a heated battle of aesthetics with the T.M. Opera
O in the mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... How can this be? I had no idea an opponent of such strength and beauty existed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She matches my pace at every step, with the exact same timing. Even
her poses are the same as mine, but how?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Answer me, mirror self!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It could be that she's thinking the same thing as I am. Have it your
way. I never truly believed our struggle would end here anyway!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: On to the next challenge! That's right—a staring contest!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pft, hehe... Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Foiled once again! How can I keep from smiling before such
immeasurable beauty? I'm at my wit's end!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Blasted fate. It's another draw... You're good—I grant you that—my
mirror world self!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But the prelude of your defeat draws near! Our destinies will be
decided in this final duel... Red light, green light!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You don't know when I'll saaay... red light!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gah?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm overwhelmed. The glamour of this Umamusume is too much!
Please, I must know your name...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't! To be tagged means losing the battle! But why can't I stop
myself from reaching for her hand?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been bested, Trainer. My mirror self had even me bound by her
spell.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the insult... I curse her! I detest how beautiful the mirror me is!
I've never felt so strongly!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But you won't find me weeping over it. You'll see. One day I will
triumph over myself. For I shall be Over—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngah! The beauty—it burns!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I was naive to underestimate your true power, mirror self. Truly,
striving to surpass you may lead to my death...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's collapsed on the floor, completely immobile. Being defeated by
herself must've really vexed her.
choice_data_list: ...Come on, Opera. You can do it.
...Come on, Opera. You can do it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're right. "Defeat" isn't in my vocabulary. I am determined to seize
glory next time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You know... You're rather something, Trainer. My respect for you has
grown immensely.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Because you continue to gaze at me unblinkingly, my blinding
radiance be damned.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: If that strength of mind isn't to be respected, I don't know what is.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And if I'm to defeat myself, I, too, must acquire that iron will. Yet...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those looks are just too appealing... O me in the mirror, you are truly
the rival to end all rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O may have met the greatest opponent of her life in that
mirror... Wait, what am I saying?
